message:
feat(fcp-e2e): add host resilience E2E flow tests (73 tests)

Tests circuit breaker (open/close/half-open transitions), bulkhead
concurrency, health-based routing, adaptive load shedding by priority,
operation timeouts, connector isolation, merge_connector_health, composed
resilience flows, metrics accuracy, and full logged E2E scenarios.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
